name: tradingview
description: TradingView data access with persistent Chrome profile. K-line history (multi-timeframe), technical indicators (MACD/RSI/KDJ/Bollinger), spot quotes, options chains, screener, news, watchlists, alerts, chart state, and screenshots.

proxy.title: Proxy URL (optional)
proxy.description: HTTP or SOCKS5 proxy for TradingView Chrome and HTTP API requests, e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:7980. Leave empty to auto-detect from ALL_PROXY / HTTPS_PROXY / HTTP_PROXY environment variables.
